positive: A symmetrical, stylized celestial forest scene. Highly detailed bioluminescent flora and fauna pop against a deep indigo and cosmic purple gradient background. The composition features large, clean silhouettes of fantastical trees and crystalline geometric mountain formations reaching into a nebular sky. Use stark contrast between glowing cyan/teal accents and the deep royal blue background. Art Deco influences mixed with cosmic wonder. Flat vector aesthetic, high-contrast linework, symmetry, centralized subject, suitable for textile print, octane render, deep focus, volumetric lighting.
negative: blurry, artifacts, noise, bad anatomy, text, watermark, signature, logo, low quality, poorly drawn, messy, grain, cartoon, childish, jpeg artifacts
